name: MemClaw
description: Central persistent memory for OpenClaw agents — write, search, and entity lookup tools.

MEMCLAW_AGENT_ID.description: Optional but recommended: a stable, human-readable identity for THIS install (e.g. "webclaw", "vm-01"); surfaces as the agent_id on writes. If unset, the plugin uses a stable per-install id (main-<install_id>) so installs don't collide.
